Section.Label: Chapter_Hartley_atlas_Section_Hartley_atlas
Section.Heading: Hartley atlas

ManSection.Description: Loads the Hartley atlas data from the RAMP data directory. RAMP first looks for the compact atlas file HartleyInfoCompact.txt.gz, and falls back to the original HartleyInfo.txt format. The data is cached after the first call.
Returns the Hartley IDs known to RAMP.
Returns the permutation group stored for the Hartley ID hid.
Returns the finitely presented group stored for the Hartley ID hid.
Returns the reflexible maniplex associated to the Hartley ID hid, using the stored permutation group.
Returns all Hartley IDs whose stored permutation group gives a maniplex isomorphic to maniplex.
Returns the first Hartley ID whose stored permutation group gives a maniplex isomorphic to maniplex, or fail if none is found.
